verbGlossary.OPENS AT: {source}log record is created and enters this active {target}, beginning its daily tracking lifecycle.
verbGlossary.CLOSES OUT AT: {source}log is finalized and locked for the day at this terminal {target}, preventing further edits.
verbGlossary.FOLLOWS: {source}record adheres to this standard {target} pattern from creation through completion.
verbGlossary.COMPOSED IN: {source}is drafted and edited in this preliminary {target} before formal submission.
verbGlossary.CIRCULATED VIA: {source}is sent to project stakeholders through this distribution {target}.
verbGlossary.REPORTED AT: {source} is formally logged and reported at this submission {target}.
verbGlossary.AWAITS: {source} is queued and waiting for action at {target}; no progress until someone acts.
verbGlossary.CERTIFIED UPON: {source}cost record is formally certified as accurate and payable at {target}.
verbGlossary.ROUTES THROUGH: {source}record passes through {target} chain or workflow pattern as part of its processing.
verbGlossary.LOGGED AT: {source}is entered into the system at this initial tracking {target}.
verbGlossary.RELEASED UPON: {source} is cleared for processing when {target} is reached.
verbGlossary.ACCEPTED AT: {source}delivered material or inspected item meets specifications and is dispositioned at this conforming {target}.
verbGlossary.REJECTED AT: {source}delivered material or inspected item fails to meet specifications and is dispositioned at this deficient {target}.
verbGlossary.TRACKED DURING: {source}is monitored while it remains in this active {target}.
verbGlossary.ESCALATES TO: {source}record automatically transitions to {target} when deadlines or thresholds are breached.
verbGlossary.INSPECTED VIA: The material or field item undergoes quality verification through this inspect-and-{target}.
verbGlossary.PASSES AT: {source}inspected item meets acceptance criteria and is dispositioned at this conforming {target}.
verbGlossary.INITIATED AT: {source}is first recorded and opened at {target}, starting the tracking clock.
verbGlossary.EVALUATED DURING: {source}is assessed for legitimacy and impact while held at this review {target}.
verbGlossary.SUBSTANTIATED UPON: {source}is validated as legitimate when {target} is reached.
verbGlossary.REMEDIATED DURING: {source}is underway to address the violation while the record remains in this active {target}.
verbGlossary.ABATED AT: {source}is corrected and the violation record is closed at this terminal {target}.
verbGlossary.ELEVATES TO: {source} is escalated through this formal escalation {target} when severity or recurrence warrants it.
verbGlossary.INVESTIGATED DURING: {source}is under formal investigation while the record remains at this review {target}.
verbGlossary.ADJUDICATED AT: {source}is concluded and findings are finalized at this closed {target}.
verbGlossary.GOVERNED BY: {source}inspection follows the rules and transitions defined by {target} pattern.
verbGlossary.FLAGGED AT: {source}inspection item is marked as non-conforming and dispositioned at this deficient {target}.
verbGlossary.QUEUED AT: {source}inspection item is staged and waiting for a reviewer at this ready-for-review {target}.
verbGlossary.ORIGINATES IN: {source} is first created in {target}, typically as an editable draft before any review begins.
verbGlossary.EXECUTED UPON: The T&M ticket or field authorization becomes a binding commitment when {target} is reached.
verbGlossary.COUNTERSIGNED VIA: The field ticket obtains the owner or GC representative counter-signature through this e-signature {target}.
verbGlossary.VALIDATED VIA: {source}measurement undergoes verification through this review-and-respond {target} pattern.
verbGlossary.REQUESTED AT: {source} is formally submitted and enters this {target} awaiting fulfillment.
verbGlossary.DISPATCHED UPON: {source} is mobilized and assigned to the project when {target} is reached.
verbGlossary.ROUTED THROUGH: The field request passes through {target} chain for multi-level authorization before fulfillment.
verbGlossary.MOBILIZED AT: {source}assignment is activated and enters this open {target} on the project.
verbGlossary.DEMOBILIZED AT: {source}assignment is completed and the record is closed at this terminal {target}.
verbGlossary.MANIFESTED AT: {source}waste hauling record is formally documented with manifest details at this submission {target}.
verbGlossary.DISTRIBUTED VIA: {source} is sent to project stakeholders through this distribution list {target}.
verbGlossary.BOUND BY: {source} is constrained by this due date, requiring timely submission.
verbGlossary.ADVANCED DURING: {source}scheduled work progresses and is updated while in this active {target}.
verbGlossary.SYNCED VIA: {source}scheduled work task link is synchronized with the project schedule through this mapped {target} mechanism.
verbGlossary.INCORPORATED AT: {source}plan revision is accepted with noted conditions and integrated into the project documents at {target}.
verbGlossary.CHECKED IN AT: {source}is logged as arriving on the jobsite and the record enters this open {target}.
verbGlossary.CHECKED OUT AT: The visitor departs the jobsite and the log entry is closed at this terminal {target}.
verbGlossary.CORRELATED WITH: {source}is analyzed in conjunction with {target} measure to identify patterns.
verbGlossary.COMPARED AGAINST: {source}is evaluated relative to {target} approval rate for performance insight.
verbGlossary.INDEXED BY: {source}is normalized and tracked using {target} escalation measure.
